response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned engineer with 8+ years of experience, strong software-craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), and genuine high-scale distributed-systems exposure (low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic). However, the resume shows no direct experience with the core focus of this role: experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis and bias detection. The polyglot background covers several required languages, but there is little evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-team systemic leadership or growth-engineering work. Worth a screening conversation to probe data/experimentation depth, but the domain gap is significant.
strengths: 8+ years experience with high-scale, low-latency distributed-systems work
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring
Polyglot covering several required languages (C/C++, C#, Java, JS/TS)
concerns: Limited evidence of telemetry, metrics, and statistical/experimental analysis
Title and scope suggest Senior/Staff, not Principal-level multi-team leadership
